news.paragraph: No fresh ticker-specific news available for MU this build (Yahoo returned nothing readable, or every article was paywalled). Falling back to sector + macro context: MU is classified as Semis. Macro backdrop: 10Y Treasury yield at 4.59% (+2.80% over 5d, rising), DXY at 99.19 (-0.08% over 5d, flat) — see the Bonds & USD tab for how this typically translates to this sector. Treat this take as market context, not a name-specific catalyst.

examples.body: $ARM $MU $QCOM can crash the semiconductor sector if it wants to. Just saying. We all will be wrecked $SPY $QQQ
